targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE blocked = true AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT client_ip)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE client_ip IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE captcha_present = true AND captcha_valid = false AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE honeypot_triggered = true AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE mail_sent = true AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM security_events WHERE endpoint = '/api/auth/login' AND login_success = false AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT
    client_ip,
    COUNT(*) AS requests,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS blocked_percent,
    COUNT(DISTINCT endpoint) AS endpoints,
    COUNT(DISTINCT email_domain) AS domains_used,
    COUNT(DISTINCT email_hash) AS email_addresses,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = false AND endpoint = '/api/auth/login') AS failed_logins,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_sent = true) AS mails_sent,
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 50 OR 
             (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 20 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) > 10) THEN 100
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE honeypot_triggered = true) > 0 THEN 90
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 20 THEN 80
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 10 OR COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) > 5 THEN 70
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT endpoint) > 5 THEN 60
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 5 THEN 50
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) > 3 THEN 40
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT email_domain) > 3 THEN 30
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 2 THEN 20
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) > 1 THEN 10
        ELSE 0
    END AS risk_score,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND client_ip IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_ip
ORDER BY risk_score DESC, requests DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
    COUNT(*) AS "Total Requests",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS "Blocked",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false AND captcha_present = true) AS "CAPTCHA Failed",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = false AND endpoint = '/api/auth/login') AS "Login Failed",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_sent = true) AS "Emails Sent"
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    client_ip,
    COUNT(*) AS login_attempts,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = false) AS failed_logins,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = true) AS successful_logins,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(DISTINCT email_hash) AS accounts_tried,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND endpoint = '/api/auth/login'
GROUP BY client_ip
ORDER BY failed_logins DESC, login_attempts DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    email_domain,
    COUNT(*) AS attempts,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_sent = true) AS mails_sent,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false AND captcha_present = true) AS captcha_failed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_ip) AS distinct_ips,
    COUNT(DISTINCT email_hash) AS distinct_addresses,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND email_domain IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY email_domain
ORDER BY attempts DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    COALESCE(block_reason, 'NOT_BLOCKED') AS metric,
    COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY block_reason
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    COALESCE(user_agent, 'Unknown') AS user_agent,
    COUNT(*) AS requests,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_ip) AS distinct_ips,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false AND captcha_present = true) AS captcha_failed,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY user_agent
ORDER BY requests DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE http_status >= 200 AND http_status < 300) AS "2xx Success",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE http_status >= 400 AND http_status < 500) AS "4xx Client Error",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE http_status = 429) AS "429 Rate Limit",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE http_status >= 500) AS "5xx Server Error"
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND http_status IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    client_ip,
    COUNT(*) AS hits_last_5min,
    COUNT(DISTINCT endpoint) AS endpoints_hit,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) AS captcha_fails,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE honeypot_triggered = true) AS honeypot,
    ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT endpoint) AS endpoints,
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) > 10 THEN 100
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_valid = false) > 5 THEN 80
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE honeypot_triggered = true) > 0 THEN 90
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 20 THEN 70
        ELSE 50
    END AS risk_score,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_hit
FROM security_events
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
  AND client_ip IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_ip
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY last_hit DESC, risk_score DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    endpoint AS metric,
    COUNT(*)::double precision AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true)::double precision AS blocked,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_sent = true)::double precision AS mails_sent
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY endpoint
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM security_events
WHERE kill_switch_triggered = true
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM security_events
WHERE circuit_breaker_triggered = true
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT
    COALESCE(referer, '(direct)') AS referer,
    COUNT(*) AS requests,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_ip) AS distinct_ips,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY referer
ORDER BY requests DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    COALESCE(origin, '(none)') AS origin,
    COUNT(*) AS requests,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_ip) AS distinct_ips,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_seen
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY origin
ORDER BY requests DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_type = 'STORE_ACCESS') AS "Store Access",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_type = 'EMAIL_VERIFICATION') AS "Email Verification",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_type = 'PASSWORD_RESET') AS "Password Reset",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_type = 'PHONE_VERIFICATION') AS "Phone Verification",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mail_type IS NOT NULL AND mail_sent = false) AS "Blocked Emails"
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND mail_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH first_seen_ips AS (
    SELECT
        client_ip,
        MIN(created_at) AS first_seen
    FROM security_events
    WHERE client_ip IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY client_ip
)
SELECT
    f.client_ip,
    f.first_seen,
    COUNT(se.*) AS requests_today,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE se.blocked = true) AS blocked,
    COUNT(DISTINCT se.endpoint) AS endpoints,
    MAX(se.created_at) AS last_seen
FROM first_seen_ips f
JOIN security_events se ON se.client_ip = f.client_ip
WHERE f.first_seen > CURRENT_DATE
  AND se.created_at > CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY f.client_ip, f.first_seen
ORDER BY f.first_seen DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_present = true AND captcha_valid = true) AS "CAPTCHA Success",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_present = true AND captcha_valid = false) AS "CAPTCHA Failed",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE captcha_present = false) AS "No CAPTCHA"
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = true) AS "Successful Logins",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE login_success = false) AS "Failed Logins",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE blocked = true) AS "Blocked Logins"
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND endpoint = '/api/auth/login'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    created_at,
    event_type,
    endpoint,
    client_ip,
    email_masked,
    email_domain,
    mail_type,
    COALESCE(captcha_valid, false) AS captcha_valid,
    blocked,
    block_reason,
    kill_switch_triggered,
    circuit_breaker_triggered,
    mail_sent,
    login_success,
    http_status,
    LEFT(COALESCE(user_agent, ''), 80) AS user_agent
FROM security_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT client_ip FROM security_events WHERE client_ip IS NOT NULL ORDER BY client_ip
list.label: IP Address
list.name: selected_ip
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT client_ip FROM security_events WHERE client_ip IS NOT NULL ORDER BY client_ip

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT endpoint FROM security_events WHERE endpoint IS NOT NULL ORDER BY endpoint
list.label: Endpoint
list.name: endpoint
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT endpoint FROM security_events WHERE endpoint IS NOT NULL ORDER BY endpoint
